title: Floating Hair on Unit 01 in EoE
display_title: Floating Hair on Unit 01 in EoE
wikitext:
[]: What happened to EVA-01 at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by Nephilim » Tue Jun 22, 2004 1:13 am After Shinji says goodbye to his mother, The Evangelion goes flying to space, and we can see a white or blue thing coming out of his helmet. Here is an image: Everybody told me that it was hair, becasue at that point, Yui was compleltly fused with the eva, or that the eva was finally a complete human. I thought that was so weird that the Eva has hair, but only until i found this sketch of evangelion: Here we can see the eva as a complete WOMAN!!! Can sombody go deeper in this subject?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jun 22, 2004 1:19 am I believe that blue thing is just supposed to be Yui's soul, not Unit-01's hair.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Tue Jun 22, 2004 1:24 am Odd, I never noticed that, at first it looked like electricity or something, but then I realized that it wasn't transparent. Obviously, the reason for that is because Yui's soul is inside the Eva. So why was it all of a sudden visible? It may be showing how Yui is now in complete control over the Eva, as she (and Fuyutsuki) had stated, "as long as one soul remains inside Eva, it will be eternal proof that mankind ever existed." She is that soul.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Tue Jun 22, 2004 1:45 am I thought that it was Yui's soul also, but look at that scene again carefuly. It really looks like hair!!!, and every old eva fan said that to me. The souls are represented always like red dots, and also we always have known that Yui's soul is in the core of the eva. So i really think that this thing is hair. And also, in the second image, the sketch is official, so that's got to mean something, don't you think? The thing that i would like to know is WHY it has hair. :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Tue Jun 22, 2004 1:51 am As I said, it's to show you that Yui now has full control over the Eva, the Eva does not literally have to have hair; it's just symbolism. At least, that's how I interpreted it.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Tue Jun 22, 2004 8:17 am not all souls are represented by red dots...remember the opening credits of the series and moments when Shinji feels his mother's presence in the Eva before it goes berserk...her soul is represented by a wavy blue object much like the "hair" above. I think it is just Anno's way of symbolizing that Yui is remaining in the Eva--just symbolism...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Tue Jun 22, 2004 10:34 am Hey, cool sombody besides me noticed it!

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Tue Jun 22, 2004 10:56 am Sorry, but are my posts invisible to everyone? I've already given you a straight answer.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Tue Jun 22, 2004 1:02 pm Oh man, nobody thinks like i do :cry: sob sob In other forums all the other guys thought like i do :( But not here, WHYYY !!! Just kiding , but you are right, souls are also represented by a white little thing that seems like spermatozoid (ep 20) and that water reflex in blue water. But i still think that this thing is hair :x !!!

[]:             Quote Post by GraveDigger » Wed Jul 07, 2004 12:32 pm I thought that Eva’s head burst in to flames. I guess it could be hair, I don’t know I’d have to see it again, I don’t remember it right off the top of my head... If it was fire or hair.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:41 am it looks like the white shape that appears in the intro to each episode (and when eva 01 goes beserk) so perhaps it is yui's soul...its probably drifting the way it is because the eva is moving...

[]:             Quote Post by Lord Tyreal » Thu Jul 08, 2004 9:51 am God I love Evangelion its the best anime series ever!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:37 pm Lord Tyreal (Isn't it spelt Tyrael?): Duh!

[]:             Quote Post by Lord Tyreal » Thu Jul 08, 2004 4:31 pm Duh, no its not, go to blizzard.com before you think you know what your talking about.

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 4:45 pm I'd say it's Yui's soul. It looks exectly the same as the flame we see in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Jul 08, 2004 5:30 pm Lord Tyreal wrote: God I love Evangelion its the best anime series ever!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 5:32 pm Lord Tyreal wrote: God I love Evangelion its the best anime series ever!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:27 pm max3000 wrote: I'd say it's Yui's soul. It looks exectly the same as the flame we see in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:44 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: max3000 wrote: I'd say it's Yui's soul. It looks exectly the same as the flame we see in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:56 pm max3000 wrote: We see it when ever Unit 01 goes berserk
